title: Bazaar Tracker Build Catalog
description: Schema for <hero>_builds.json catalogs consumed by scorer.py and web/build_helpers.py. Required fields are strict; additionalProperties: true so the enricher can add new optional fields without a coordinated schema bump.

schema_version.description: Integer contract version. Tracker refuses catalogs outside [BUILDS_SCHEMA_MIN, BUILDS_SCHEMA_MAX].

hero.description: Display name of the hero this catalog covers (e.g. 'Karnok').

season.description: Season number. Accepted as integer or string for backward compatibility.

notes.description: Top-level curator notes about the hero's playstyle and win conditions.

item_tier_list.description: Overall item quality ranking. Keys are tier labels (S/A/B/C/D/F) with string-array values, plus an optional 'description' string.

universal_utility_items.description: Items the runtime reads to score early picks. Required by scorer.score_early_decision.

economy_items.description: Economy-priority items for the early phase. Required by scorer.score_early_decision.

archetypes.description: Build archetypes for this phase. Consumed by scorer and web/build_helpers.

archetype.description: A single build archetype. Runtime reads name, core_items, carry_items, support_items, timing_profile.

name.description: Archetype display name referenced in score notes and overlay.

core_items.description: Items that define the build identity. Used for commit detection in scorer.check_commit_threshold.

carry_items.description: Primary damage/scaling items. Required for commit detection.

timing_profile.description: When the archetype's payoff comes online. Used in TIMING_PROFILE_CURVES weighting.
